payload.text: Reminder: Run job acquisition production pipeline now. Generate roles/companies/contacts/outreach artifacts, enforce schema validation, and publish morning_job_pipeline report.
Reminder: Run follow-up cycle now (3/7/14 day contacts), update outreach history, and publish followups_today artifact.
Reminder: Run mission-control QA check. Verify artifact existence + schema evidence, append artifact_ledger entry, and flag NO_ARTIFACTS_CREATED or STAGNATION_ALERT when required.
